case_title: MARIAN HANCZAREK VS. COBRA SOLUTIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANCZAREK, MARIAN AS TO DEFENDANT COBRA SOLUTIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
